UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, N.R. AS TO DEFENDANT BELTON, CRAIG DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS FILED BY DEFENDANT BELTON, CRAIG ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS

#1 JUDGE: DONNA LITTLE; DIANA CHEN/CSR; GVANHEST/CLERK. CAUSE CALLED FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. COUNSEL ARNOLD EVJE II PRESENT ON BEHALF OF PLAINTIFF, DEFT PRESENT IN PRO PER. A JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO STIPULATION HAS BEEN READ INTO THE RECORD AND SIGNED BY DEFT IN OPEN COURT.
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $12.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, N.R.

MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, N.R. SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR AUG-19-1997 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 01 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON AUG-26-1997 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BELTON, CRAIG THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 74 SIXTH STREET, #401, S.F., STAYED UNTIL SEP-02-1997, LEASE FORFEITED, 5PM. NO FURTHER STAYS. PLTF WVS BACK RENT & DAMAGES UNLESS DEFT FAILS TO VACATE, THEN DEFT PAYS $360- RENT + $12- PER DAY FROM 8/1/97 + $165- COSTS. MUTUAL WAIVER OF ALL CLAIMS. PERSONAL PROPERTY LEFT DEEMED ABANDONED. NO ONE ELSE HAS RIGHT TO CLAIM POSSESSION. SEC DEPOSIT FORFEITED TO PLTF.
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT BELTON, CRAIG
